---
title: "Reference"
---

Reference material for rig.

## Command-line reference

This is the full command-line reference for rig, generated from the `--help`
output of every command and subcommand. You can also get the same information
from rig itself:

```sh
rig --help                 # overview of all commands
rig <subcommand> --help    # detailed help for a subcommand
```

See [Usage](../usage.qmd) for a more task-oriented walkthrough, including the
platform-specific `rig system` subcommands.

Each command has its own page, generated by `website/gen-cli-reference.sh`
(run `make cli-reference`), which captures `--help` for every command and
subcommand recursively.

{{< include _overview.md >}}

### Commands

{{< include _toc.md >}}

## Reference manuals

Additional reference manuals (e.g. rendered HTML or PDF documents) can be
linked or embedded here as they become available.
